text: OpenAI signs exclusive DOD contract. AI superiority gap between US-China widening. India unrepresented.
EU proposes India-EU free trade corridor bypassing China's Belt & Road. Negotiations begin Q2.
400 coordinated inauthentic accounts spreading false India-Pakistan ceasefire narrative identified on X.
India approves domestic drone swarm program. Budget: ₹12,000 Cr. Delivery: 18 months.
UN FAO: India wheat export ban enters 3rd year. Global food price index rises 8% MoM.
Russia redirects 40% of Arctic LNG to India after EU sanctions. Price: 14% below market.
IMD: Monsoon deficit 23% in Kharif belt. Agricultural output risk: HIGH. 3 states in red zone.
IPCC emergency bulletin: South Asia heat stress index at record high. 3 consecutive years above threshold.
BRICS summit agenda leaked: INR trade settlement to be formally proposed by India in October.
Pakistan army chief meets ISI + Chinese ambassador — 4hr closed session, Islamabad
SCO foreign ministers meet: India blocks China's Belt & Road inclusion in joint communique.
Ukraine drone strike hits Russian oil depot — 3rd this week. Global oil supply impact: +$2.1/barrel.
Cross-LoC firing incidents: +47% YoY. Pakistani artillery shelling resumed in 3 sectors.
US Deputy SecState arrives New Delhi — agenda: QUAD expansion, AI governance framework
INR hits 84.6/USD. RBI intervention signals. FII outflows: $2.1B this week.
PLA naval vessels detected near Andaman Islands — 3 destroyers, AIS disabled
ISRO Gaganyaan abort test successful. India 3rd nation with crewed abort capability.
Brent crude +4.2% after OPEC+ emergency meeting. India import cost impact: ₹28,000 Cr/month
China restricts gallium and germanium exports — 4 materials India depends on for defense production.
NSA shares SIGINT on Chinese infiltration of Indian telecom backbone with RAW. 3 nodes compromised.
Taiwan Strait: PLAN conducts unannounced live-fire exercises. US 7th Fleet repositioning.
OPEC+ cuts production by 1.5M bpd. India dependency ratio increases to 87% import-sourced.
Credit Suisse successor bank flags $4.2T derivatives exposure. Contagion risk: MEDIUM-HIGH.
14 nations formally express interest in INR settlement. Saudi Arabia in preliminary talks.
White House confirms India iCET semiconductor package — decision window: 30 days.
China files 847 new semiconductor patents this week. India: 12. Gap widening at accelerating rate.
Satellite imagery shows new PLA forward logistics base 40km from LAC — Depsang sector.
Pakistan test-fires Shaheen-III MRBM. Range covers all Indian cities. 3rd test this year.
Cauvery basin water level at 34% — lowest since 1974. Inter-state water dispute escalating.
APT41 lateral movement detected in 2 Indian PSU networks. Pattern matches 2022 AIIMS attack.
